description: Canonical registry of all MCP tools and SKILLs in the arifOS federation. This file is the single source of truth for tool deduplication, capability mapping, and invariant constraint enforcement. No tool may be created if it overlaps ≥2 tags with an existing tool.

skills.name: arifos-deep-research
skills.description: Deep-research substrate for arif_explore: NAVIGATOR (web traversal with Malaysia/ASEAN Tier A sources), DRILLER (API surface discovery via OpenAPI introspect or live probe), MAPPER (knowledge graph traversal via Graphiti/Qdrant). Includes ReplayReceipt for traceable, HMAC-ready verification.

skills.name: aforge-governed-execution
skills.description: A-FORGE execution — build, deploy, verify. Gated by arifOS SEAL.

skills.name: agentic-session-init
skills.description: Session bootstrap — reality check, organ attest, bind session.

skills.name: geox-claim-grammar
skills.description: Geological claim structure — evidence_for, evidence_against, missing_tests.

skills.name: wealth-capital-reasoning
skills.description: WEALTH capital reasoning — POS, EMV, valuation, governed consequence.

skills.name: well-substrate-readiness
skills.description: Human readiness — vitality, fatigue, dignity. Reflect, never diagnose.

skills.name: auditor-validator-kutip-sampah
skills.description: Audit, validate, clean junk. The immune system skill.

skills.name: arifos-federation-router
skills.description: Route intent to correct organ. One intent, one organ. No collapse.

skills.name: hf-governed-intelligence
skills.description: Constitutional HF operating skill — Hub sovereignty, dataset metabolism (AAA→FFF), tokenization doctrine, inference discipline (F5 Gödel band), fine-tune governance (F1 Amanah), FFF 6-gate promotion, eval & SEAL receipt chain. Every HF act is a constitutional act.

deep_research_stub_tools.description: 30+ schema-correct stub tools for deep research substrate. All are logging-only stubs. Full implementation deferred to future forge sessions.

capability_tags.web-research: Web search, fetch, and URL traversal
capability_tags.hf-hub: Hugging Face Hub repo management, auth, sync, cards, branches, tags
capability_tags.hf-dataset: HF dataset loading, schema validation, streaming, format conversion
capability_tags.hf-inference: HF model loading, pipeline, generation, batched inference, quantization
capability_tags.hf-tokenization: HF tokenizer discipline, token measurement, chunking, bilingual packing
capability_tags.hf-finetune: HF PEFT/LoRA/QLoRA fine-tuning, adapter management, SFT training
capability_tags.hf-eval: HF evaluation gating, benchmarks, promotion/demotion, regression checks
capability_tags.hf-security: HF license review, gating check, PII scan, provenance tracking
capability_tags.hf-governance: Constitutional HF operations — floor binding, FFF gates, eval receipts, VAULT999 sealing

antipatterns.name: DUPLICATE_TOOL
antipatterns.description: If a new tool overlaps ≥2 capability_tags with an existing tool, it is a duplicate. Do not create it. Extend the existing tool instead.
antipatterns.enforcement: grep TOOLREGISTRY.json before creating any new tool

antipatterns.name: SELF_AUTHORIZING
antipatterns.description: No tool may self-authorize. Every mutating action requires a valid lease + prior SEAL. This is enforced at the arifOS kernel level.

antipatterns.name: ZOMBIE_RESURRECTION
antipatterns.description: Deprecated tools must not be re-implemented without explicit F13 SOVEREIGN approval. Check deprecation-registry.json before creating any tool.

antipatterns.name: LAYER_COLLAPSE
antipatterns.description: L1 domain (GEOX/WEALTH/WELL) tools may not implement L2 execution (A-FORGE) or L3 governance (arifOS) logic. Each organ has one role.

antipatterns.name: MYSTERY_TOOL
antipatterns.description: Every tool must have a capability_tag from this registry. If creating a tool with a new tag not in this list, add the tag to capability_tags first.

NAVIGATOR.godel_lock: LK-2: No silent expansion beyond 15 curated sources
